relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The main point: we have a high priest seated in the heavens.
He serves the holy places and the true tent pitched by the Lord.
Every priest has something to offer.
Earthly priesthood continues according to Law.
Messiah mediates a better covenant with better promises.
The need for another covenant is named.
Jeremiah promises new covenant to Israel and Judah.
The earlier covenant was not remained in.
The new covenant writes Divine law in mind and heart.
All will know the Lord, small to great.
The old order is aging toward disappearance.

contemplative_note: Hebrews 8 is covenant inwardness: heavenly service, law written in mind and heart, mercy, and knowing the Lord from small to great.
